meaning: pron.这样的人或物adj.像这样的,诸如此类的
examples: You can buy brushes, paint, varnish and suchlike there.
The prices of polymers and suchlike materials will decrease.
They are tending to trivialize the risk they undergo with suchlike operation.
The idea of an Islamist takeover terrifies Tunisia's liberal-minded middle-class, which eschews veils and beards and suchlike.
But what if the real green answer is that certain industries have to contract - make less glass, produce fewer ventilation units and suchlike.
